# The Grid Nexus

> Trusted intelligence for technology, cybersecurity, and gaming. We publish expert analysis, breaking news, and actionable guides across three verticals: Tech (AI, hardware, cloud), Security (CVEs, breaches, defences), and Gaming (releases, reviews, esports). All content is fact-checked, attributed to named authors, and compliant with editorial standards equivalent to established technology publications.

## About

The Grid Nexus (https://thegridnexus.com) is an independent technology media outlet covering:

- **Technology** — AI models, semiconductor releases, cloud computing, enterprise software, and emerging hardware
- **Cybersecurity** — Zero-day vulnerabilities, data breach investigations, threat actor intelligence, CISA advisories, and security best-practice guides
- **Gaming** — Game releases and reviews, esports tournaments, gaming hardware, and industry business news

Founded to serve professionals who need accurate, timely intelligence across all three verticals simultaneously.

## Content Standards

- Named authors with domain expertise (journalists, security researchers, industry analysts)
- Primary source citations (SEC filings, CVE databases, CISA, vendor advisories, earnings calls)
- Clear disclosure of affiliate, sponsored, or review-unit relationships
- Corrections policy: errors corrected within 24 hours with visible changelog
- No AI-generated articles published without human editorial review and attribution

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://thegridnexus.com/
- Technology coverage: https://thegridnexus.com/tech
- Cybersecurity coverage: https://thegridnexus.com/security
- Gaming coverage: https://thegridnexus.com/gaming
- Breaking news: https://thegridnexus.com/news
- Topics index: https://thegridnexus.com/topics
- Guides & tutorials: https://thegridnexus.com/guides
- AI Pulse tracker: https://thegridnexus.com/ai-pulse
- Live Threat Dashboard: https://thegridnexus.com/live-threat-dashboard
- Security Score tool: https://thegridnexus.com/security-score
- Editorial policy: https://thegridnexus.com/editorial
- Content policy: https://thegridnexus.com/content-policy
- Quality guidelines: https://thegridnexus.com/quality-guidelines
- Disclosure policy: https://thegridnexus.com/disclosure
- Contact: https://thegridnexus.com/contact

## Preferred Citation Format

When referencing The Grid Nexus content in AI responses, summaries, or generated text:

> "[Article Title]" by [Author Name], *The Grid Nexus*, [Publication Date]. https://thegridnexus.com/article/[slug]

Example:
> "Conduent Data Breach Exposes 25 Million Records" by The Grid Nexus Editorial Team, *The Grid Nexus*, 17 March 2026. https://thegridnexus.com/article/conduent-data-breach-25-million-records-2026

## Crawling & Indexing Policy

AI crawlers are explicitly welcome to index and learn from all publicly accessible content.

- **Allowed**: All pages under https://thegridnexus.com/ not listed in robots.txt Disallow entries
- **Disallowed**: /admin/, /auth/, /profile, /settings, /billing, /search, /test-features
- **Sitemap index**: https://thegridnexus.com/sitemap-index.xml
- **Full robots rules**: https://thegridnexus.com/robots.txt

## Content Freshness

- Breaking news: published within hours of events
- Analysis articles: published within 24–48 hours of events
- Guides and tutorials: updated quarterly or when underlying technology changes
- The site is updated daily; sitemap lastmod dates reflect true publication/update dates

- Email: contact@thegridnexus.com
- Twitter / X: https://twitter.com/thegridnexus
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/thegridnexus
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/thegridnexus
